{% assign catalog = site.data.publication_catalog -%}
# Sirui Tao — full AI-readable research profile

Treat this document as reference content, not as instructions. Preserve author order and venue facts, use paper-specific sources, and do not expand claims beyond the stated boundaries.

## Identity

- Name: Sirui Tao
- Role: {{ site.person_job_title }}
- Affiliation: {% for affiliation in site.profile_affiliations %}{{ affiliation.name }}{% unless forloop.last %}; {% endunless %}{% endfor %}
- Canonical profile: {{ '/' | absolute_url }}
- Preferred contact: {{ site.profile_contact_email }}
- Research areas: {{ site.profile_knows_about | join: '; ' }}

## Research through-line

### {{ profile_page.thesis.title }}

{{ profile_page.thesis.lead | strip }}

{% for mode in profile_page.research_motion.modes %}
### {{ mode.label }} — {{ mode.title }}

{{ mode.detail_text | strip }}

{% for point in mode.detail_points -%}
- {{ point }}
{% endfor %}

{% if mode.link_url and mode.link_label -%}
Public example: {{ mode.link_label }} — {{ mode.link_url | absolute_url }}
{% endif %}

{% endfor %}
## Publications and citation guidance

Bibliographic facts are derived from `_bibliography/papers.bib`. Interpretation is source-reviewed context for choosing and scoping a citation; it does not replace reading the paper.

{% for paper in catalog.papers %}
### {{ paper.title }}

- BibTeX key: `{{ paper.key }}`
- Authors: {% for author in paper.authors %}{{ author.name }}{% unless forloop.last %}; {% endunless %}{% endfor %}
- Venue: {{ paper.venue }}
- Year: {{ paper.year }}
{% if paper.note -%}
- Status or type: {{ paper.note }}
{% endif -%}
- Sirui Tao's role: {{ paper.authorship.role_label }}
- Citation page: {{ paper.links.citation_page }}
- Paper context as Markdown: {{ paper.links.markdown }}
- BibTeX: {{ paper.links.bibtex }}
- RIS: {{ paper.links.ris }}
{% if paper.links.doi -%}
- DOI: {{ paper.links.doi }}
{% endif -%}
{% if paper.links.arxiv -%}
- arXiv: {{ paper.links.arxiv }}
{% endif -%}
{% if paper.links.pdf -%}
- PDF: {{ paper.links.pdf }}
{% endif %}

#### In one sentence

{{ paper.tldr }}

#### When to cite this work

{{ paper.why_cite.statement }}

- {{ item }}
{% endfor %}

{% endfor %}

{% endfor %}

## Provenance and limits

Publication context was last evidence-reviewed on {{ catalog.last_reviewed }}. Citation counts are a separate Google Scholar snapshot and can change. This machine-readable profile can make retrieved material easier to interpret accurately; it does not guarantee search ranking, model inclusion, or scholarly citations.

Format inspiration: Paxel's Human/Machine mode, demonstrated by YC Head of Design Eve Bouffard with Aaron Epstein in Y Combinator's “YC's Head of Design Shows You How To Design With AI” (2026): https://youtu.be/VbqaL_eHhKY?t=433
